---
title: "analyzer.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/pennyone/analyzer.test.ts"
loc: 37
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.40
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 7.41
overall_score: 6.37
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [analyzeFile](file://../../../src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.js)

### Exports
- `code`
- `result`
- `imp`
- `code`
- `result`
